name: HMS BYMS 2141 (J 941)
events: 24 May 1944 Around 0230 hours, HMS Viking (Lt. R. Bannar-Martin, DSC, RN), made rendez-vous with her escort HMS BYMS 2141 (A/Skr.Lt. J.W.B. Jobson, RNR). They then proceeded to Holy Loch in company. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
